title: Snowe's Flesh Utilities
description: Turn Flesh Into Leather With Ease!
body:
## --About--

Got an absurd amount of rotten flesh?? Well, The flesh conversion blocks added in this mod are your go-to solution for this problem. These blocks convert rotten flesh into leather with little to no cost. The recipes are very cheap, making this mod an easy solution to your overflowing rotten flesh supply.
 
These utilities are also helpful for many mods that require a LOT of leather (backpacks for example), making them more accessible through mob farming. Enjoy!

 **--Included content--**

New blocks (Flesh Stabilizer, Flesh Compressor)
A new intermediate item (Compressed Flesh)
New recipes!
More to come ;)

_P.S. You are free to add this to any modpack!_

**--REQUIRES GECKOLIB--**
